title: AI Traffic Workshop Slides

description: Student-friendly guide covering passwords, phishing, and data privacy essentials.

description: Career exploration guide featuring 15 STEM professions, salary ranges, and education pathways.

description: Printable flashcards with 30 key terms in AI, sensors, and urban technology.

description: Facilitated discussion prompts on fairness, bias, and responsible AI for high school classrooms.

description: One-page overview of the Gold Award project for parents and community members.
